title: AL's Allay Pack x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Allay Pack compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
This pack makes AL's Allay Pack compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

 

Since AL's Allay Pack uses a custom model for it's Allays, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

 

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
